title: Search Engine Implementation and Evaluation Lifecycle
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of building, deploying, and evaluating a search engine system.
relationships: Crawling & Indexing feeds into the searchable index
Query Processing uses the index and sends results to Ranking
Ranking sends ordered results to the User Interface
The User Interface is Deployed to users
User interactions and system performance are captured during Evaluation
Evaluation results create a Feedback Loop to improve Crawling, Indexing, and Ranking
